posts.author: seandotson (Sean Dotson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have the Monday.com app installed on slack. I can create an item from the App channel using /monday-item…

However if I attempt to create one using the in context method in a thread I always get back “Sorry that didn’t work, try again…”

image419×559 29.2 KB

Any insight?

posts.author: Brian_D (Brian Daly)
posts.cookedHtml: Remove Monday app and reinstall - it solved it for me
